title: roldana langlassei
intro: Roldana langlassei, also known as the mountain ageratum or Langlasse's roldana, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as showing potential antiviral and antimicrobial properties. Roldana langlassei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
